data.title: iBio completes $50M public offering, aims for $100M gross proceeds if warrants exercised, $0.1M expected.
data.description: If all the Series G warrants and Series H warrants are exercised for cash, the total gross proceeds would amount to $100 million.

data.title: Hivello, invested by Blockmate, recognized in Forbes for DePIN innovation, showcasing growth in sector.
data.description: In Toronto on August 25, 2025, Blockmate Ventures Inc. (TSX.V: MATE) (OTCQB: MATEF) (FSE: 8MH), known as "Blockmate," shared exciting news about its investee, Hivello Holdings, being spotlighted in a recent Forbes piece titled “DePIN Passive Income: 5 Ideas That Really Work.” The article highlights the increasing attention toward Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks (DePIN) and acknowledges Hivello's contribution to this fast-growing industry. This recognition signifies a significant milestone for Hivello Holdings and reaffirms the heightened interest in DePIN solutions in the market.

data.title: Domaine launches AI Commerce Suite for ecommerce brands to capture AI traffic, aiding growth and personalization.
data.description: In New York, Domaine Worldwide, a prominent global Shopify design and development firm, has unveiled the AI Commerce Suite for enterprise brands aiming for expansion through personalization, automation, and discoverability. This exclusive service, crafted by Domaine's Research and Development Labs, enables brands to harness the upcoming online growth wave. The AI Commerce Suite integrates large language model (LLM) technology for automated product descriptions, images, and succinct content.

data.title: Seadrill secures contracts in Angola for Sonadrill joint venture, based in Hamilton, Bermuda.
data.description: Bermuda-based company Seadrill recently made an announcement regarding new contracts secured in Angola for their joint venture, Sonadrill. The contracts involve a significant number of drilling operations in the region, reflecting the company's continued growth and presence in the Angolan market. This development underscores Seadrill's commitment to expanding its operations and partnerships in the offshore drilling sector.

data.title: Modern Campus receives majority growth investment from Providence Equity Partners, a private equity firm, terms undisclosed.
data.description: A leading learner-to-earner lifecycle platform for higher education, Modern Campus headquartered in Toronto and Providence, R.I., has secured a majority growth investment from Providence Equity Partners, L.L.C. The specialist private equity firm, Providence, focuses on growth-oriented investments in media, communications, education, and technology companies in North America and Europe. The financial details of the investment remain undisclosed. Modern Campus offers a wide range of software solutions for the higher education sector.

data.title: CloudWalk dominates Open Finance in Brazil, InfinitePay controls 19.5% consent share, up 97%. Leading ahead of banks & fintechs.
data.description: In São Paulo, CloudWalk, a rapidly expanding global fintech company known for InfinitePay and Jim.com, has emerged as the top in Brazil’s Open Finance rankings. Revealed in the recent quarterly report from consulting firm Bip, CloudWalk, specifically through its InfinitePay platform, has secured 19.5% of the total business account data-sharing consents, marking a significant 97% surge since May. This milestone places CloudWalk ahead of prominent banks and fintechs with more extensive corporate clientele. The company was established in 20XX.

data.title: Synaptics to join investor conferences on August 28 and September 4, 2025 in San Jose, California (Nasdaq: SYNA).
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in San Jose, California, Synaptics® Incorporated (Nasdaq: SYNA) disclosed its involvement in upcoming investor conferences.

data.title: OmniAb secures $30M in private placement offering, selling 21,254,106 shares at $1.40. Director shares sold at $1.85.
data.description: In Emeryville, California, OmniAb, Inc. (NASDAQ: OABI) disclosed that it has signed a definitive securities purchase agreement to offer and distribute a total of 21,254,106 shares of its common stock at $1.40 each (or $1.85 for certain officers and directors) in a private placement. The company estimates the total gross income from this private placement to be around $30 million, prior to any placement agent fees and offering expenses.

data.title: Grey Wolf Animal Health Corp reported a 32.3% increase to $9.5 million in Q2 2025 revenue, with adjusted EBITDA up 56.8% to $2.2 million. Pharmacy business sales grew by 51.4% to $6.2 million. Animal Health business increased by 7.6% in Q2. Adjusted EBITDA margin improved to 19.6%. Total operating expenses were $3.8 million. Operating income for the period was $1.5 million. Net income for the period was $751,230. Earnings per share were $0.02.
data.description: Grey Wolf Animal Health Corp. reported its financial results for the quarter and six months ending June 30, 2025. Revenue increased by 32.3% to $9.5 million for the quarter and by 31.7% to $17.4 million for the first six months of the year. Gross profit also saw an increase of 40.6% to $5.3 million for the quarter and 37.6% to $9.5 million for the first six months. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 56.8% to $2.2 million for the quarter and 53.2% to $3.4 million for the first six months. The Pharmacy business performed particularly well with sales up 51.4% to $6.2 million for the quarter and 57.8% to $11.3 million year-to-date, driven by compounded products and the acquisition of Compounding Pharmacy of Manitoba. The Animal Health business saw a 7.6% increase in the second quarter, but remained flat year-to-date. Adjusted EBITDA margin improved to 19.6% compared to 16.9% in the previous year. Operating expenses, operating income, and net income were also highlighted in the report.

data.title: LSL Pharma Group reports 72% revenue increase to $7.2 million in Q2 2025, with net loss of $0.4 million. Expansion of Eye-Care portfolio and CMO segment driving growth. CEO optimistic about future prospects.
data.description: LSL Pharma Group Inc. reported record revenues in Q2 2025, with $7.2 million in revenues, a 72% increase from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.0 million, a 56% increase. The company also secured $17.5 million in bank financing and redeemed $3.3 million in convertible debentures. They signed agreements to market up to 16 sterile eye drops in Canada and filed for FDA qualification for manufacturing ointment products for the US. The non-binding letter of intent to acquire a Quebec-based CMO could add $8-10 million to revenues. Quarterly revenues for the CMO segment increased by 165%. The company is progressing with new eye-care products and financing agreements to aid growth initiatives.

data.title: Fluid Transfer System Market expected to reach $29.95 billion in 2032, with a 3.3% CAGR from $23.93 billion in 2025.
data.description: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets predicts that the Fluid Transfer System Market will see a significant increase, reaching USD 29.95 billion by 2032, up from USD 23.93 billion in 2025, marking a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.3%. The market is expected to experience steady growth in the coming years, indicating a positive trend in the industry.

data.title: AECOM and Arup consortium wins place on UK National Highways' SPaTS3 with £495 million potential value over 6 years.
data.description: In Dallas, AECOM (NYSE: ACM) revealed they secured a position on the SPaTS3 framework in the U.K., in partnership with Arup. The framework has a total value nearing £495 million, and it will run for six years with six suppliers participating. It is anticipated to continue until 2031, aiding National Highways in overseeing and enhancing England’s motorway network.

data.title: Timken appoints Lucian Boldea as President and CEO; global technology leader in bearings and motion.
data.description: In North Canton, Ohio on August 25, 2025, The Timken Company, a leading global provider of engineered bearings and industrial motion solutions, declared Lucian Boldea as the new President and CEO, alongside a member of the Board of Directors. Timken, listed on NYSE as TKR and accessible at www.timken.com, focuses on innovative technology in its operations.
GRAYSCALE FILES S-1 FOR AVALANCHE ETF •Grayscale has filed an S-1 with the SEC for its Avalanche Trust (AVAX) to convert into a spot ETF.
